_meta.description: Orthodox icon catalog. Each entry resolves an iconId referenced from Person, DailyCommemoration, or DailyCommemorationItem. Image files live under public/icons/ and are served as static assets by Next.js — the IconRef.src field is the public URL (e.g. /icons/icon-theotokos-vladimir.jpg). Three import paths: scripts/ingest/icons/fetch-wikimedia.ts (Wikimedia Commons), scripts/ingest/icons/auto-curate.ts (Wikimedia + Wikidata bulk-curation), and scripts/ingest/icons/import-local-icons.ts (hand-collected files dropped into content/normalized/icons/).
_meta.license: Image files are public-domain, CC0, CC-BY, CC-BY-SA, or hand-curated (provenance unknown). Attribution strings carry per-icon source info.
_meta.coverage: 203 icons covering Christ Pantocrator, Theotokos of Vladimir, Rublev Trinity, the Twelve Great Feasts, ~30 movable-cycle feasts/Sundays, and ~150 saints/fathers across the Person seed.
